Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) AS total_renovaciones,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT _id\) AS _ids_unicos,
  COUNT\(*\) - COUNT\(DISTINCT _id\) AS posibles_duplicados
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01';
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Ver _ids que tienen más de 1 registro \(duplicados\)
SELECT 
  _id,
  COUNT\(*\) AS veces,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(Atm ORDER BY Atm SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS cajeros,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS ids_internos,
  MIN\(TransationDate\) AS primera,
  MAX\(TransationDate\) AS ultima,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(Total ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS totales,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(PaymentType ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS payment_types
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY veces DESC
LIMIT 30;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Resumen por patrones de duplicado
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN cajeros_distintos = 1 AND mismo_timestamp = 1 THEN 'Mismo cajero, mismo momento \(doble insert\)'
    WHEN cajeros_distintos = 1 AND mismo_timestamp = 0 THEN 'Mismo cajero, diferente momento'
    WHEN cajeros_distintos > 1 THEN 'Cajeros distintos \(cross-cajero\)'
  END AS tipo_duplicado,
  COUNT\(*\) AS cantidad_grupos,
  SUM\(total_registros\) AS registros_extra
FROM \(
  SELECT 
    _id,
    COUNT\(*\) AS total_registros,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT Atm\) AS cajeros_distintos,
    IF\(MIN\(TransationDate\) = MAX\(TransationDate\), 1, 0\) AS mismo_timestamp
  FROM local_transaction
  WHERE TransactionType = 1
    AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
  GROUP BY _id
  HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
\) t
GROUP BY tipo_duplicado;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Distribución por mes y cajero de los duplicados
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT\(MIN\(TransationDate\), '%Y-%m'\) AS mes,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT Atm ORDER BY Atm SEPARATOR '/'\) AS cajeros,
  COUNT\(*\) AS grupos_duplicados,
  SUM\(COUNT\(*\)\) OVER \(PARTITION BY DATE_FORMAT\(MIN\(TransationDate\), '%Y-%m'\)\) AS total_mes
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY mes, cajeros;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Resumen limpio por mes
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT\(f.primera, '%Y-%m'\) AS mes,
  SUM\(f.cantidad\) AS grupos_con_duplicado,
  SUM\(f.cantidad * \(f.cnt - 1\)\) AS registros_sobrantes,
  SUM\(f.cantidad * f.cnt\) AS registros_afectados
FROM \(
  SELECT 
    MIN\(TransationDate\) AS primera,
    COUNT\(*\) AS cnt,
    1 AS cantidad
  FROM local_transaction
  WHERE TransactionType = 1
    AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
  GROUP BY _id
  HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
\) f
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT\(f.primera, '%Y-%m'\)
ORDER BY mes;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Verificar patrón: ¿los duplicados tienen IDs internos consecutivos? \(doble insert al momento del sync\)
SELECT 
  _id,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ', '\) AS ids_internos,
  MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\) AS diferencia_id,
  MIN\(TransationDate\) AS fecha,
  Atm,
  Total,
  PaymentType
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-02-01'
  AND TransationDate < '2026-02-02'
GROUP BY _id, Atm, Total, PaymentType, TransationDate
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
LIMIT 10;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Muestra de duplicados de febrero para ver patrón de IDs consecutivos
SELECT 
  _id,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ', '\) AS ids_internos,
  MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\) AS dif_id,
  MIN\(TransationDate\) AS fecha,
  Atm,
  Total
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-02-09'
  AND TransationDate < '2026-02-10'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
LIMIT 15;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Ver si todos los duplicados tienen IDs consecutivos \(dif = 1\)
SELECT 
  MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\) AS dif_id,
  COUNT\(*\) AS grupos
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY dif_id
LIMIT 20;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Agrupar diferencias para ver si hay casos con IDs no consecutivos
SELECT 
  MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\) AS dif_id,
  COUNT\(*\) AS grupos_con_esa_diferencia
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
GROUP BY dif_id
ORDER BY dif_id;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
SELECT dif_id, COUNT\(*\) AS grupos
FROM \(
  SELECT _id, MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\) AS dif_id
  FROM local_transaction
  WHERE TransactionType = 1 AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
  GROUP BY _id
  HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
\) t
GROUP BY dif_id
ORDER BY dif_id;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Ver los casos con diferencia grande \(cross-cajero, distintos momentos\)
SELECT 
  _id,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS ids_internos,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(TransationDate ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS fechas,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(Atm ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS cajeros,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(Total ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS totales,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(PaymentType ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS pagos,
  MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\) AS dif_id
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1 AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1 AND \(MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\)\) > 100
ORDER BY dif_id;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Ver los casos con dif_id = 2 \(¿triple insert?\)
SELECT 
  _id,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS ids_internos,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(TransationDate ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS fechas,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(Atm ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS cajeros,
  COUNT\(*\) AS cnt
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1 AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1 AND \(MAX\(local_transaction_id\) - MIN\(local_transaction_id\)\) = 2
ORDER BY _id;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Ver si existe el campo deleted_at en local_transaction
DESCRIBE local_transaction;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Estado del deleted_at en renovaciones desde enero 2026
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN deleted_at IS NULL THEN 'Sin eliminar \(activo\)' ELSE 'Soft deleted' END AS estado,
  COUNT\(*\) AS cantidad
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY estado;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Ver si los deleted_at coinciden con los duplicados identificados
-- ¿El registro más nuevo \(duplicado\) es el que se eliminó, o el original?
SELECT 
  _id,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(IF\(deleted_at IS NULL, 'ACTIVO', 'BORRADO'\) ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS estados,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(TransationDate ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS fechas,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(Atm ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS cajeros
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1
  AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
LIMIT 20;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
SELECT combo, SUM\(grupos\) AS total_grupos
FROM \(
  SELECT _id,
    GROUP_CONCAT\(DISTINCT IF\(deleted_at IS NULL, 'ACTIVO', 'BORRADO'\) ORDER BY deleted_at SEPARATOR '+'\) AS combo,
    COUNT\(*\) AS grupos
  FROM local_transaction
  WHERE TransactionType = 1 AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
  GROUP BY _id
  HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
\) t
GROUP BY combo;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Los 66 grupos donde ambos están ACTIVOS \(sin soft delete aplicado\)
SELECT 
  _id,
  COUNT\(*\) AS cnt,
  GROUP_CONCAT\(local_transaction_id ORDER BY local_transaction_id SEPARATOR ' | '\) AS ids,
  MIN\(TransationDate\) AS fecha,
  Atm,
  Total
FROM local_transaction
WHERE TransactionType = 1 AND TransationDate >= '2026-01-01' AND deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY _id
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY fecha DESC
LIMIT 20;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
-- Verificar exactamente qué campos son idénticos en los duplicados
SELECT a.local_transaction_id, a._id, a.TransationDate, a.Atm, a.Total, a.PaymentType, a.Membership, a.Package, a.deleted_at
FROM local_transaction a
JOIN local_transaction b ON a._id = b._id 
  AND a.local_transaction_id < b.local_transaction_id
  AND a.TransactionType = 1
WHERE a.TransactionType = 1
  AND a.TransationDate >= '2026-01-01'
  AND a.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT 5;
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -h 10.200.1.227 -u admin -pT0t4lG4s2020 u514131194_d0CoK -e "
SELECT 
  DATE\(TransationDate\) AS fecha,
  Atm,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN PaymentType = 0 THEN Total ELSE 0 END\) AS efectivo,
  SUM\(CASE WHEN PaymentType IN \(1,2\) THEN Total ELSE 0 END\) AS tarjeta,
  COUNT\(CASE WHEN TransactionType = 2 AND Total > 0 THEN 1 END\) AS lavados_paquete,
  COUNT\(CASE WHEN TransactionType = 2 AND Total = 0 AND PaymentType != 3 THEN 1 END\) AS lavados_membresia,
  COUNT\(CASE WHEN TransactionType = 2 AND PaymentType = 3 THEN 1 END\) AS cortesia
FROM local_transaction
WHERE DATE\(TransationDate\) = CURDATE\(\)
  AND deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE\(TransationDate\), Atm;
" 2>/dev/null)
